_doc: Buyer-journey stage per blog post slug. Drives audit-cta rendering: which CTA is primary (highlighted card) and which is secondary (muted link).

_stages.awareness: Intro/explainer. Reader is learning what AEO is. Primary CTA: free audit. Secondary: pricing.
_stages.consideration: Comparison/methodology. Reader is weighing approaches. Equal weight: both CTAs visible, audit slightly leads (still gathering data).
_stages.decision: Pricing/budget/case. Reader is buyer-shape — already knows what AEO is, evaluating spend. Primary CTA: pricing (handlingsplan). Secondary: audit.
